SwiftAndroidQuickstartHandling ErrorsDownloadLogin Kit with AndroidVideo Kit With AndroidAndroid FileProviderChangelogOverview of TikTok Mini GamesTikTok mini games offer users a readily available and engaging entertainment experience, directly accessible within the TikTok app. Learn about how you can leverage TikTok mini games to reach users across the globe. What are TikTok mini games?TikTok mini games are lightweight, cross-border entertainment apps integrated with the short-video ecosystem, centered on the core concepts of instant play and global sharing. Users can launch mini games directly in TikTok without downloading them, and they are compatible with both Android and iOS. In addition to satisfying users' diverse entertainment demands worldwide, TikTok mini games also builds a global traffic bridge for developers. TikTok not only offers users cross-regional entertainment experiences but also helps developers reach global markets at low costs and achieve global game distribution. We look forward to global developers joining us to drive lightweight game innovation and ecosystem growth. Core features of TikTok mini gamesThe core features of TikTok mini games include the following:Instant and seamless gaming experienceInstant play with no download requiredDiverse gameplay types, including puzzle-solving and competitive games, adapted to the usage habits of users in different regionsGlobal traffic empowermentMulti-entry exposure (short-video embedding, Minis Center, direct search access, and more) to achieve seamless conversionAlready launched in markets including the U.S., Japan, and Indonesia, with new markets coming soonLeverages TikTok's global monthly active user base to provides large-scale traffic supportLow-threshold development and tool supportCompatible with mainstream engines like Cocos and Unity, no code reconstruction required, enabling rapid game launchOffers basic tools such as account authorization, cross-border payment, and multilingual localization to lower the threshold for development and operationMonetization and data optimization capabilitiesOpens dual monetization models: In-app ads (IAA) and in-app purchases (IAP), meeting the revenue needs of different game typesBuilt-in data tools for monetization ROI, user retention, eCPM, and more to help optimize operation strategiesHow do players find mini games on TikTok? TikTok offers multiple pathways for user exposure and access to mini games. Users can access mini games through the following channels:Search entrySearch for precise keywords such as game names to access games directly from search resultsRecently playedRe-visit entries are available on the sidebar of the personal homepage, core function areas, and Minis Center, showing recently played mini gamesShort-video embeddingAd campaigns allow users to see mini game embeddings when watching game-related short videos, and users can tap to open the mini game directly Collaborate with TikTok creators who can add mini game embeddings when posting videos to drive trafficAlgorithmic recommendation entryMinis Center provides promotional slots, allowing high-quality games to gain more traffic and exposureBased on users' gaming behaviors such as frequently played game types, session duration, subscriptions, and more, tailored recommendations are pushed when users browse short videosSocial fission entryAccess games via shared links from friendsAccess via a friend's private message chat window to compete against each other or play togetherHow can you monetize your mini game? TikTok mini games offer multiple monetization models. Revenue optimization should be aligned with game design.In-app ads (IAA) Incentivized video ads: Users receive in-game rewards after watching adsInterstitial ads: Pop up during game pauses or level transitionsIn-app purchases (IAP)Offer virtual items (skins, item packs, and more) with transactions completed via TikTok's payment systemLearn more about how monetization works. Mini game integration processThe mini game set up and integration workflow generally follows the steps depicted:Note: Before you start, you will need access to a TikTok developer account on the TikTok for Developers website. You can sign up for an account if you don't have one.For a comprehensive look at the integration process, refer to the mini games integration workflow guide. After publishing your mini gameAfter your mini game is published on TikTok and is publicly available, you can evaluate its performance and handle user feedback on our platform. AnalyticsView your data dashboard complete with metrics for behavior, retention, and more. Report handlingUsers can submit reports to provide feedback about user experience, payment issues, or content violations. Refer to the report handling guide for more details.Was this document helpful?On this pageWhat are TikTok mini games?Core features of TikTok mini gamesHow do players find mini games on TikTok?
